title: Spicy Beef Fajitas
description: Quick and flavorful fajitas made with spicy beef and sautéed vegetables. Serve with warm flour tortillas and your favorite toppings.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of oil and cook the beef for 3-4 minutes or until browned.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining oil and cook the bell peppers and onions for 4-5 minutes or until tender.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the spicy pepper flakes and fajita seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef back into the skillet and stir to combine.
Warm the flour tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the fajitas by placing the beef and vegetable mixture onto the tortillas and topping with salsa and cheese if desired.
